title: Usopp Dreams of Elbaf
description: On pages 1–4, usopp dreams of elbaf as usopp is inspired by the giants’ courage, while the crew’s separate groups are pulled deeper into Little Garden’s hazards.
scene: Usopp Dreams of Elbaf. Usopp is inspired by the giants’ courage, while the crew’s separate groups are pulled deeper into Little Garden’s hazards. The scene focuses on the immediate character conflict rather than background exposition.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Well, it's not like it never snows or anything,

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: But that part of Grand Line up to the very first island is special.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: The 7 magnetic fields that stretch from reverse mountain clash together to make things even more unpredictable.

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: So you can't let down your guard even for a minute.

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Even though it would be quite rare to encounter such bizarre conditions once you've passed the first island,

dialogue.speaker: Dorry
dialogue.text: Grand line is still by far the most difficult ocean to navigate on.

dialogue.speaker: Dorry
dialogue.text: So it's absolutely imperative that you never underestimate this sea!

dialogue.speaker: Brogy
dialogue.text: Anybody up for some special drinks!?

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: You bet we are!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Quick!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Are you sure things'll be fine like this!?

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: It'll be fine.

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: They'll work hard when we come across rough seas. It's not like they want to die or anything.

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Here.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: That's... true...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: But at this rate... we might be caught unaware.

dialogue.speaker: Brogy
dialogue.text: Oh, looks like this duck knows how to drink!

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: Tastes good, right? Drink up, Buddy!

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: Quick

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Hey, usopp. Can you make us some fishing rods?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Fishing, eh? Not a bad idea.

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Sure thing! Let me just fire up my ol' artistic skills to create masterwork fishing r-

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: being on this ship,

dialogue.speaker: Usopp
dialogue.text: Sure makes you lose the will to even worry, doesn't it?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Yes...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: It is quite relaxing...

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Hey, look! It's a dolphin!

dialogue.speaker: Brogy
dialogue.text: Oh!

dialogue.speaker: Dorry
dialogue.text: Oh, it's so cu...

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: It's freakin' huge!

dialogue.speaker: Vivi
dialogue.text: Let's run away!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Aye-aye, Cap'n!

summary: This part advances the chapter by focusing on usopp dreams of elbaf. It keeps the main tension clear while preserving the dialogue that drives the scene.
